pairs.label: 100 (scene prompt, clip) pairs
pairs.detail: Luna's real-world scene prompts paired with generated clips of those scenes.

adapter.label: scenario-staging LoRA (illustrative)
adapter.status: No video adapter was trained for this workshop. The takes below are locally rendered animatics of the same scene.

evaluation.label: 6 held-out scene prompts
evaluation.status: Cached illustrative values below; scenario adherence needs a vision judge.

before.label: Base take (illustrative)
before.caption: the same scene with per-frame flicker: positions, tones, and progress wobble

after.label: Adapted take (illustrative)
after.caption: the scene staged steadily: one push-in, coherent motion

payload.metrics_note: Illustrative cached values. Stabilizing motion on a small clip set usually softens per-frame detail; the flickery base take is also the larger file, because flicker defeats the encoder.
payload.media_provenance: Both takes rendered locally by tools/make_media.py; the base take adds per-frame jitter. Neither is an LTX or Veo generation.
payload.note: The same conceptual chain the text page runs for real: pairs in, adapter out, eval always. Here every element is a reviewed cached illustration, because live video training is impractical in the room; the card says which parts are real files and which are illustrative numbers.
